outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources maintained stable drilling activity with 6 active sites at decision date, including 1 newly active pad, reflecting modest operational expansion into Q3 2021. The relative activity delta of 1.2 indicates above-average momentum compared to recent quarters, supporting continued production growth near 98,000 boe/d. With full exposure to the Permian segment and realized prices at a 8% discount to WTI, revenue is anchored at $369.6M amid a low WTI environment averaging $45/bbl.
